friday.reason: Travel hard block — Microsoft AI Tour Houston (May 27-29). Hotel checkout, driving to HOU airport at 4:30 PM CT, flight IAH→DFW AA1929 departs 6:50 PM CT. Not in Frisco.

saturday.reason: No conflicts. David returns home Friday night ~9:30 PM CT (flight lands DFW 8:20 PM, transit home by 9:30 PM). Susie's Mom trip ended Friday. Full afternoon window open.

sunday.reason: Church volunteering hard block 8:30 AM-1:30 PM CT. No other events found. Golf viable 2:30 PM CT onward.

heat_streak.note: Weather API unavailable in this environment — defaulted heat_streak: false. Default preferred start: 1:00 PM ($21/player).

weather_note: Both Open-Meteo and NWS APIs blocked in this environment. Scoring based on calendar analysis only.

top_options.rationale: Saturday 1 PM — heat streak inactive, 1 PM is default preferred, no calendar conflicts, full window available
Sunday 2:30 PM — church buffer respected, 18 holes fits before dark, no other conflicts. Sunday +5 penalty.
Saturday 4 PM — saves $6/player but non-default slot with heat streak inactive. Good fallback if Sat 1 PM unavailable at booking.
